conversation.text: Hey, have you talked to Grandma lately?

translations.Somali: Haye, ma la hadashay ayeeyo dhawaan?

conversation.text: Yeah, I called her yesterday. She's doing well. She was talking about how much she enjoyed the family gathering last weekend.

translations.Somali: Haa, waxaan wacay shalay. Way fiicantahay. Waxay ka sheekeyneysay sida ay ugu riyaaqday isu imaatinkii qoyska ee usbuucii hore.

conversation.text: Oh, that's nice to hear. Mom was really happy to see everyone together.

translations.Somali: Oo, waa wax wanaagsan in la maqlo. Hooyo aad bay ugu faraxday inay qof walba wada aragto.

conversation.text: Definitely. Mom put in so much effort to make everything perfect. Did Uncle John say anything about his new job?

translations.Somali: Haa, runtii. Hooyo dadaal badan bay gelisay si wax walba u noqdaan kuwo hagaagsan. Ma sheekaystay Adeer John wax ku saabsan shaqadiisa cusub?

conversation.text: He did! He seems pretty excited about it. He's going to be traveling a lot, though.

translations.Somali: Haa, wuu sameeyay! Aad buu ugu faraxsan yahay. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, wuxuu safri doonaa marar badan.

conversation.text: That's great for him. I know he loves traveling. Have you seen our stepbrother Mike recently?

translations.Somali: Taasi waa wax fiican isaga. Waan ogahay inuu jecel yahay safarka. Ma aragtay walaalkeen Mike dhawaan?

conversation.text: Not since last month. He mentioned he's been busy with college stuff. We should invite him over soon.

translations.Somali: Tan iyo bishii hore ma arkin. Wuxuu sheegay inuu mashquul ku ahaa waxbarashada jaamacadda. Waa inaan dhowaan casuunno.

conversation.text: Absolutely. Maybe we can plan a small get-together. Grandma would love that too.

translations.Somali: Haa, dhab ahaantii. Waxaa laga yaabaa inaan qorsheyno kulan yar. Ayeeyo iyaduna aad bay u jeclaan lahayd taas.
